chats.askAnything: Ask me anything about your business and I'll help you out.
chats.generalDescription: Start a conversation with your AI assistant about general topics related to your business.
chats.marketingDescription: Get help with marketing strategies, campaigns, and promotional content for your business.
chats.financeDescription: Discuss financial planning, budgeting, and money management for your business.
chats.salesDescription: Get assistance with sales strategies, customer acquisition, and revenue growth.
chats.customerServiceDescription: Improve your customer service approach and handle customer inquiries effectively.
chats.customerDescription: Improve your customer service approach and handle customer inquiries effectively.
chats.researchDescription: Conduct research, analyze market trends, and gather insights for your business decisions.
chats.globalDescription: Start a conversation with your AI assistant about general topics related to your business.

businessDescriptionInput.title: To create better visuals for your business, can you describe your business and any products or services do you offer?

home.subtitle: Here's a quick look at how things are going.

login.description: Log in or register with the options below

slide0.lead: We finally have one place for workspaceal notes, billing, and follow-ups,
slide0.highlight: and the team onboards new staff in a day instead of a week"
slide0.name: Jordan Lee

slide1.lead: The biggest win is knowing nothing slips through the cracks
slide1.highlight: from intake to the next visit."
slide1.name: Samira Khan

slide2.lead: We replaced three tools with a single workflow
slide2.highlight: and contacts get clearer, faster answers."
slide2.name: Elena Rossi

slide3.lead: I needed software that my whole team would actually use
slide3.highlight: not another clunky back office app."
slide3.name: Alex Nguyen

Business name must be at least 2 characters

onboarding.title: Set up your workspace
onboarding.description: Accept an invite or create a workspace to continue.
onboarding.restoringDescription: We found an existing workspace and are reconnecting your session now.
onboarding.restoreErrorDescription: Try again to continue into your existing workspace.
onboarding.inviteDescription: We found invitations for {email}. Accept one to continue.
onboarding.inviteEmpty: No invitation found for this account.
onboarding.createDescription: No invitation is associated with {email}, so let's create your workspace first.
onboarding.createHelper: You can invite your team and finish setup once you're inside.
onboarding.sideDescription: We’ll take you straight into your workspace once this step is done.

invite.title: Join with one tap
invite.description: Pending invites appear automatically here so people land in the right workspace.

create.title: Start with a clean workspace
create.description: If there’s no invite, you can create a workspace without leaving onboarding.

team.title: Add the rest later
team.description: Workspace creation stays lightweight so you can invite teammates after setup.

errors.uploadLogo: We created your workspace, but couldn't upload the logo. You can add it from settings.
errors.invalidOrganizationName: Enter a workspace name to continue.

errors.upload: We couldn't upload that image. Please try again.
errors.tooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum size is {size}MB.

acceptInvitation.title: You're invited
acceptInvitation.description: You've been invited to join this workspace as a {role}. This invitation was sent to {email}.
acceptInvitation.descriptionFallback: Accept this invitation to join the workspace.
acceptInvitation.signInAsOther: Sign in with a different account

mismatch.title: This invitation was sent to a different email
mismatch.description: The invitation is for {invitationEmail}, but you're signed in as {userEmail}. Sign out and sign back in with the invited email to accept.

globalError.globalDescription: We apologize for the inconvenience. An unexpected error has occurred.

dialog.title: Choose your plan
dialog.description: Select a plan to unlock all features and take your business to the next level.
dialog.footer: All plans include a 14-day free trial. Cancel anytime.

starter.description: Perfect for small teams getting started

pro.description: For growing teams that need more power

upgrade.title: Upgrade your plan
upgrade.description: Choose a plan that best fits your needs and unlock more features.

input.fileReadFailed: Could not read one of those files. Try again.
input.fileUploadFailed: Could not upload one of those files.
input.tooManyFiles: You can attach up to {count} files.
input.unsupportedFileType: Only text-like files can be uploaded to knowledge right now.

errorPage.title: Something went wrong
errorPage.description: It looks like there was an error, try reloading the page

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your personal information and account details.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: This is your avatar. Click on the avatar to upload a custom one from your files.
avatar.hint: An avatar is optional but strongly recommended.

displayName.title: Display Name
displayName.description: Please enter your full name, or a display name you are comfortable with.

email.title: Email
email.hint: This is your primary email address for notifications and more.

fields.name: Name
fields.emailHint: Email cannot be changed. Contact support if you need to update it.

name.title: Workspace name
name.description: The name shown for your workspace in the app and in shared contexts.
name.hint: Use the name contacts and teammates recognize.

logo.title: Logo
logo.description: Upload an image that represents your workspace.
logo.hint: PNG, JPG, WEBP or SVG up to 4MB. A square image works best.

organization.empty: No active workspace is selected. Switch or create a workspace to edit these settings.
organization.readOnly: Only workspace owners and admins can edit workspace details.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to update this workspace.

team.title: Team
team.description: Invite teammates and manage who has access to this workspace.

empty.noOrganization: No active workspace is selected. Switch or create a workspace to manage your team.
empty.noMembers: No teammates yet. Invite someone to get started.

invite.title: Invite a teammate
invite.description: They'll receive an email with a link to join this workspace.

invitation.title: Manage invitation
invitation.description: Resend or cancel the invitation sent to {email}.

member.title: Remove teammate
member.description: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this team? They will immediately lose access.

subscription.description: Manage your subscription and billing settings.
subscription.freePlanDescription: You're currently on the free plan. Upgrade to unlock more features.

features.title: Plan Features
features.description: What's included in your current plan.

mfa.title: Multi-factor authentication
mfa.description: Add an additional layer of security to your account by requiring more than just a password to sign in.
mfa.socialAccountNotice: Two-factor authentication is not available for social login accounts.

errors.invalidCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.

setup.passwordDescription: Enter your password to enable two-factor authentication.
setup.scanDescription: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
setup.backupCodesDescription: Save these backup codes in a secure place. You can use them to access your account if you lose your device.
setup.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to complete setup.

disable.title: Remove two-factor authentication
disable.description: Enter your password to remove two-factor authentication from your account.
